name: Ankur Satle
bio: 10+ years of C++ experience. Passionate about templates, type systems, and building the Indian C++ community from the ground up.

name: Karan Banthia
bio: Passionate about modern C++ concurrency, performance, and helping developers write safer, faster code.

name: Sandesh Chitguppe
bio: Systems programmer specializing in coroutines, async I/O, and embedded C++. Conference speaker at CppIndiaCon 2022 and 2023.

name: Jayshree Ambekar
bio: Manages the CppIndia community, coordinates events, and ensures every member feels welcome and heard.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Active Discord helper and resource curator. Has answered over 300 questions in #cpp-help. Works on embedded systems at a leading automotive company.

name: Rahul Sharma
bio: Game engine developer and Unreal Engine expert. Gave an acclaimed talk on SIMD optimizations for game physics at CppIndiaCon 2023.
